title: Smoke
purpose: `compression/tests/smoke.vitl` is a validation module inside the `compression` family. It should be read as one focused slice of the broader family responsibility: Algorithms and interfaces for compacting data: huffman, lz, deflate, brotli, stats, and shared compression interfaces.
use_cases: A report archive can be built in memory, then compressed before emission.
A transport layer can separate serialization from compression instead of mixing both in one procedure.
imports:
src/vitte/stdlib/compression as compression
use src/vitte/stdlib/compression/interface as interface
use src/vitte/stdlib/compression/deflate as deflate
use src/vitte/stdlib/compression/brotli as brotli
use src/vitte/stdlib/compression/algorithms as algorithms
use src/vitte/stdlib/compression/lz as lz
use src/vitte/stdlib/compression/huffman as huffman
use src/vitte/stdlib/compression/stats as stats

proc compression_smoke
